dsm_context_status: small excerpt of normalized FSA-level DSM report outputs copied from local research reports
disclaimer: This is a research communication demo using simplified data. It illustrates the workflow and findings, not an operational DSM recommendation tool.

source_repositories_reviewed.name: dsm-alignment
reused_concepts: Flex D, Hilo, LogisVert, and low-income alignment constructs
area-level demand relevance versus suitability/capacity framing
small normalized FSA-level alignment-score excerpt for the app baseline

limitations: Resident-level scores are illustrative profile alignments, not validated individual predictions.
DSM source logic is area/unit-level. This demo maps a synthetic resident to a demo DA and a real FSA-level DSM report context, then adds household resemblance modifiers for communication only.
Energy and socio-demographic values are toy values designed to preserve schema and qualitative relationships without exposing private data.
